title: Italian Arias
description: A collection of the most beloved baritone arias from the Italian operatic tradition.
body: A journey through the golden age of Italian opera. Vitaly Yushmanov performs iconic arias from Verdi, Puccini, and Donizetti, showcasing the bel canto tradition at its finest.
tracks: Verdi: La Traviata - Di Provenza il mar
Puccini: La Bohème - O Mimì, tu più non torni
Mozart: Don Giovanni - Deh, vieni alla finestra
Verdi: Don Carlo - Per me giunto
